data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments), but the evidence provided does not include any checks or data related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on bookings and financial outputs but fail to demonstrate the existence of an entry ledger that links to source references. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an entry ledger with source references (orders/payments).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for entry ledger with source references
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the existence of an entry ledger with source references.
